input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation examples commonly use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON, but those formats require separate hoplite-* modules; meaningful hoplite-core coverage should use MapPropertySource/addMapSource, system properties, environment property source wrappers, or built-in .properties/.props inputs unless a format-specific module is intentionally added by the generated test.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core is usable without external services or extra test dependencies; its resolved artifact already brings Kotlin reflection/coroutines dependencies and includes built-in map/system/env property sources plus the Java .properties/.props parser.
